wbSetup.description: Initializes the Agentic Brain for the target folder by establishing its agentic identity.

example1.description: Sets up the agentic context and dev rules for the wb-core package.

output.content: Environmental Discovery, Core Workflow Files, Global Synchronization, Audit Trail

--focus.role: Focuses the setup on a specific sub-system to generate specialized context and blueprints.

example1.description: Deeply analyzes the renderer sub-system and generates a context_renderer.md and wbplan_setup.md.

wbContext.description: Generates a comprehensive Context Report containing identity, dependencies, and constraints.

example1.description: Generates context for the entire wb-core package.

output.content: Identity, Dependencies, Constraints

example1.description: Generates specific context for the index.js entry point.

output.content: Identity, Dependencies, Constraints specific to the file

wbPlan.description: Creates a structured multi-agent task plan for a given problem or objective.

example1.description: Creates a plan to add a new feature to wb-press2.

input.content: Context files, past audit/review reports, user description of the problem

output.content: Task List table with worker/validator assignments, checkboxes, and scoring.

--act.role: Generates a re-ranked actionable version of the input plan.

example1.description: Produces an action file based on the plan.

wbAudit.description: Performs a deep, honest, code-based technical audit.

example1.description: Audits the entire core2 monorepo.

input.content: All code and architecture within the folder

output.content: 9-section audit report with tables, concrete evidence, score out of 10.

example1.description: Audits the specific dev.md file for missing points.

output.content: Analysis of the file's purpose, logical flaws, and a fully enhanced suggestion with comparison table.

--act.role: Calls /wbActOn internally to produce a sibling action file (execution order) alongside the audit.

example1.description: Generates an audit report and an action file.

--wbPlan.role: Calls /wbActOn internally to produce a sibling plan file directly from the audit.

example1.description: Generates an audit report and a plan file.

wbReview.description: Performs a formal quality review of an executed task against an original plan.

example1.description: Reviews the implementation in wb-press2 against its plan.

input.content: Current codebase and the ORIGINAL PLAN markdown file

output.content: Plan vs Reality check, Technical Integrity, Review Score (1-10) and PASS/FAIL status.

--act.role: Generates an action file for fixing issues found in the review.

example1.description: Produces a review and an action list to fix fails.

--wbPlan.role: Generates a follow-up plan to address review debts.

example1.description: Produces a review and a plan to fix fails.

wbTest.description: Executes dynamic tests (UNIT, E2E, MANUAL, PERF) to verify code behavior.

example1.description: Runs unit tests for wb-core.

example2.description: Performs E2E manual testing on the demo app.

output.content: Test setup steps, execution logs, verification results, PASS/FAILED status.

wbRelease.description: Orchestrates the release by resolving circular dependencies and updating package.json versions.

example1.description: Prepares core2 monorepo for release v1.0.0-r02.

input.content: All package.json files, recent plans, audits

output.content: CHANGELOG, topological graphing order, unlinking strategy details.

wbPublish.description: Executes the final build and NPM deployment based on the wbRelease plan.

example1.description: Builds and publishes the monorepo packages to NPM.

input.content: The most recent release_*.md file, prepared package.json files

output.content: Build verification, signature inspection logs, NPM publish sequence logs.

wbDeploy.description: Orchestrates deployment of consumer apps to web hosts (Vercel, AWS, VPS).

example1.description: Deploys the demo app to production.

output.content: DNS verification, build execution logs, deployment commands executed, smoke test results.

wbClean.description: Scans for dead code, unused files, and obsolete dependencies.

example1.description: Scans wb-dataviewer for entropy and dead code.

output.content: Categorized findings: High Priority (Breaking Debt), Medium (Clutter), Low (Cosmetic).

wbLicense.description: Enforces business logic by injecting premium gating and license checks.

example1.description: Injects Pro tier gating into the PremiumTable component.

output.content: Summary report confirming Free/Pro/Dev handling and graceful UI fallbacks.

wbRefactor.description: Restructures and optimizes target code without changing visual behavior or props.

example1.description: Refactors utils.js for performance.

output.content: Summary report confirming structural changes and API parity.

wbDebug.description: Isolates and fixes errors following the Scientific Method.

example1.description: Debugs the reactivity loop in App.vue.

example2.description: Debugs based on a specific stack trace.

input.content: Stack trace, error message, or file path

output.content: Hypothesis, isolation steps, root cause explanation, and solution applied.

wbDoc.description: Injects JSDoc/TSDoc comments and generates README files without modifying logic.

example1.description: Documents index.js with JSDoc.

output.content: Summary of documented code.

example1.description: Generates a comprehensive README for the wb-chart package.

output.content: Module purpose, usage examples, API surface.

wbStandup.description: Consolidates unfinished work (open tickets, failing audits) into a single agenda.

example1.description: Generates a monorepo-wide daily standup report.

output.content: Grouped open tickets, audit debt, and definitive next-command recommendation.

--act.role: Passes the standup to /wbActOn to rank the findings.

example1.description: Generates standup and action order.

--wbPlan.role: Generates a plan directly from the standup items.

example1.description: Generates standup and plan.

wbVision.description: Proposes 3 highly innovative, strategic features to build next.

example1.description: Proposes next-gen features for wb-code.

output.content: 3 distinct feature ideas with 'Why it matters' and 'Complexity'.

wbBroadcast.description: Generates an Announcement Kit and manages version lifecycle status.

example1.description: Creates announcement kit for wb-press2 release.

output.content: Social media drafts, GitHub release notes, Blog post, VERSION_STATUS.md suggestion.

wbGit.description: Analyzes current file changes and generates Conventional Commits.

example1.description: Generates commit message for CWD.

input.content: git status, git diff, recent plans/standups

output.content: Strict Conventional Commit message with optional body.

wbSecure.description: Scans for vulnerabilities (secrets, XSS, insecure deps).

example1.description: Performs red team security scan on wb-core.

output.content: Security findings categorized as CRITICAL, WARNING, or SAFE.

wbTranslate.description: Extracts hardcoded strings and generates localized JSON files (EN, FR, AR).

example1.description: Translates strings in Banner.vue.

output.content: Summary of extracted keys and generated JSON content.

wbToWBC.description: Rewrites legacy bulky HTML/Vuetify into proprietary WBC-UI2 JSON components.

example1.description: Converts legacy table to wb-dataviewer JSON prop.

output.content: Rewritten component code, Before & After line counts.

wbMonetize.description: Bootstraps or maintains the Free/Pro/Dev tier splitting plumbing.

example1.description: Bootstraps monetization for dataviewer.

output.content: Mode (bootstrap/maintenance), feature split proposal, plumbing checklist, updated marker.

wbActOn.description: Turns a diagnostic document (audit, plan, review) into a ranked execution order.

example1.description: Processes the audit and outputs an execution ranking.

output.content: Annotated source with [Model action] callouts and §0 Ranked Execution Order.

example1.description: Finds latest report in the folder to act on.

output.content: Annotated source with ranked order.

--wbPlan.role: Also produces a sibling plan file containing one task table per 🔵 finding from the action file.

example1.description: Generates the action ranking and the corresponding wbPlan.

wbCheck.description: Pre-Flight Context Quiz to verify worker model understanding.

example1.description: Tests all categories for that package.

output.content: Model answers to the quiz questions followed by pass verdict check.

wbExplain.description: Generate persistent, formatted explanations for a specific task ID, a codebase architecture, or a general technical question, without executing code changes.

example1.description: Explains task #1 from the plan using ELI5 style.

input.content: The plan markdown file containing the task

output.content: High-level summary, deep dive, and recommended approach.

example1.command: /wbExplain packages/wb-core/ "How does the Tier parser work?" --as=expert
example1.description: Deep dives into the architecture question for the wb-core package.

input.content: Source files relevant to the query

output.content: High-level summary, deep dive, and recommended approach.

--as.role: Adopts an exact tone or formatting style from shortcuts.md (e.g. eli5, expert, fr).

example1.description: Explains the task in French, using an ELI5 analogy.

wbValid.description: Validates a worker's output by running an adversarial review — a second model checks the first model's work for correctness, completeness, and quality.

example1.description: Validates task 3 from the wb-core plan file.

input.content: Plan or report file with task table

output.content: Validation report with score, findings, and verdict

wbWork.description: Executes one or more tasks from a plan file as the Worker model, producing a task report and updating the plan's Done column.

example1.description: Executes tasks 1, 2, and 3 from the plan file.

input.content: Plan file with task table containing Task, Verify, Worker, and Validator columns

output.content: Task execution report with files read, files modified, and outcome commentary

example1.description: Execute only task 2 from the plan.

example2.description: Execute tasks 1, 2, and 6 from the plan.

--open.role: Sets Done column to ⬜ (Open) instead of executing. Overrides execution.

example1.description: Re-open task 3 without executing it.

--def.role: Sets Done column to ⏸️ (Deferred). Overrides execution.

example1.description: Defer task 2.

--can.role: Sets Done column to 🚫 (Cancelled). Overrides execution.

example1.description: Cancel all tasks.

wbHelp.description: Meta-command that catalogs all /wb* commands (no args) or shows the per-command help block for a specific command; print-only, never writes reports.

example1.description: Prints the role-grouped table of all /wb* commands.

output.content: Role-grouped table with #, Command, Role, Flags, What it does columns

example1.description: Prints the HELP_BLOCK from the wbAudit template (identical to /wbAudit -h).

input.content: The target command's template (specifically the HELP_GATE section)

output.content: Verbatim HELP_BLOCK from the target template

wbNext.description: Analyzes the current project state (recent reports, git status, stale TODOs) and produces a single ranked, actionable recommendation of what to do next.

example1.description: Recommends the next action for wb-core based on recent reports and current state.

input.content: Package reports/, git status, context.md, dev.md

output.content: Situation Summary, Suggested Next Actions (ranked table), Tips & Warnings

example1.description: Re-ranks and fills missing fields in an existing next-action file (self-correct mode).

input.content: Existing next-action markdown file matching the next-output schema

output.content: Re-ranked suggestions with missing fields filled; user annotations preserved

--scope.role: Narrows the analysis to a specific package or path.

example1.description: Scopes the recommendation to the wb-core package.

--since.role: Limits the report scan window; defaults to 7d.

example1.description: Scans reports from the last 14 days instead of the default 7.

wbIdea.description: Tracks, scores, and validates ideas before promoting them to active plans.

example1.description: Captures and scores an idea for the wb-core package.

output.content: Ideas table with Score, description, Priority, Est. Time, Valid column

--focus.role: Narrows the idea capture to a specific sub-system or concern.

example1.description: Captures ideas scoped to the renderer sub-system.

wbTrack.description: Toggles session tracking ON so every /wb* command produces its normal report AND appends a §N section to a universal daily session file with strategic commentary.

example1.description: Starts tracking for the wb-core package.

input.content: Package source code, .agents/ files, past reports

output.content: §0 Strategic Vision, contributor entries, per-command §N sections with Commentary and Recommended Next table

--finalize.role: Extracts derivative files (tips, warnings, importants, commentaries, all_commands, resume) from the session file.

example1.description: Ends tracking and extracts all derivatives from today's session file.

--scope.role: Narrows the session tracking to a specific package or scope.

example1.description: Starts tracking scoped to wb-core.
